notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Gray grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Gray hits a grand slam (4) to right center field. Austin Martin scores. Victor Caratini scores. Luke Keaschall scores.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
